commentary:
# Exchange Liquidity Commentary – 10 Jul

NYSE maintains clear dominance with the tightest liquidity profile across all metrics: an ILLIQ coefficient of just 0.0013 and Roll spread of 1.05%. The LSE significantly lags at rank six, with ILLIQ jumping nearly 95-fold to 0.1233 and Roll spread widening to 1.37%. Notably, Nasdaq 100's AR spread (0.69%) exceeds NYSE's (0.43%), suggesting slightly wider effective spreads despite comparable ILLIQ values, highlighting metric-specific nuances in market microstructure assessment.
